item.title: Version 1.6.2
item.description:
Macros

Attach a single slider to multiple colour operators across multiple groups. Each route has independent input/output ranges, inversion, and a non-linear expression curve (10 types). Save named memory slots and recall any state instantly.

  • Map any operator — including all Grade parameters — to a macro via right-click in the editor.
  • Expression curves: Linear, Exponential, Logarithmic, Sigmoid, Gaussian Bell, Stepped, Threshold, Ease In, Ease Out, Ease In/Out.
  • Up to 5 memory slots per macro (7 for the Master Grade macro in Lock Slots mode).
  • Slot rows are clickable for instant recall. Grade Memory binding supported.
  • Omni mode: routes all operators on the current group regardless of assignment.
  • Solo: pin one macro per step, mute all others.
  • ARM NEUTRAL: slider is gated until it crosses the stored neutral position.
  • Per-theme persistence in Application Support; decoupled from theme saves.

AutoSetup

Guided overlay that walks you through theme groups one at a time, cycling group presets and firing macro snapshots without using the editor directly.

  • Three traversal modes: Simple (top-level groups), Detailed (all depths), Z-Depth (experimental depth grouping).
  • Editor scrolls to, selects, and auto-expands the current group; non-active leaf groups collapse.
  • Assign mode: bind groups to macro steps directly from the AutoSetup navigator.
  • Slots view shows named memory slots for the current step; tap to recall.
  • Return arrow navigates back after a Lock Slot jump.
  • All header and icon colors driven by XML theme keys.

Other Changes

  • CFG overlay: unified header button color keys, corrected radio dot/label coloring, CYCLES sort mode layout fix.
  • Grade EDIT button active state now reads correctly from XML (gold border, warm light icon).
  • Orphaned macro routes (from deleted groups/operators) are cleaned up automatically.
  • New XML keys: MacroSlotListAccentText, AutoSetupHeaderAction*, MacroASHeaderButton*, CfgHeaderButton*.
